feat.name: Deflecting Jewel
feat.text: You walk the line between two sides of something, such as belonging to two clans, having a mixed allegiance or faith, or being caught between two possible fates. Your dual nature has attuned your head gem to the half moon, and it has manifested the power to ward away attacks by drawing a line between them and you. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack.

traits.name: Occult
traits.text:
This magic comes from the occult tradition, calling upon bizarre and ephemeral mysteries. Anything with this trait is magical.  
  
A creature with this trait is primarily constituted of or has a strong connection to occult magic.

traits.name: Sarangay
traits.text: Powerful carabao-headed warriors who live on the isles of Minata. Known for the magical gems in their foreheads that are said to contain their souls.

feat.trigger: You're the target of a ranged attack while you possess your head gem.
feat.requirement: You're aware of the triggering attack.
